creator: des@des.no
text:
=3D> Attempting to fetch http://builds.piwik.org/piwik-2.0.3.tar.gz
fetch: http://builds.piwik.org/piwik-2.0.3.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected =
7287646, actual 7287497

The distinfo from your patch is

SHA256 (piwik-2.0.3.tar.gz) =3D 03b7cb5ef571e40c831d1682b4010c7f64d62138a37=
3745c47b942225e80eca6
SIZE (piwik-2.0.3.tar.gz) =3D 7287646

whereas I get

SHA256 (piwik-2.0.3.tar.gz) =3D 87f6b56701ff57d1ccaaacf0caaddbd03104ab7c85d=
6e8700d9e224b44e8b9dc
SIZE (piwik-2.0.3.tar.gz) =3D 7287497

Could you confirm that the change is benign, i.e. not causes by someone
inserting a trojan into the distribution tarball?

(and while you're there, tell the upstream devs to never ever reroll a
tarball without bumping the version number)

DES
--=20
Dag-Erling Sm=C3=B8rgrav - des@des.no
